ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model (e.g., decision tree, neural network) */,
  "library" TEXT /* Library or framework used to implement the model (e.g., scikit-learn, TensorFlow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., image, text) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset (e.g., number of samples, bytes) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that uses this hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that generated this result */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the metric (e.g., 95% CI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_metric_name FOREIGN KEY ("metric_name") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that uses this condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of the condition (e.g., categorical, numerical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_values" (
  "condition_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition value */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition that this value belongs to */,
  "condition_value_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition value */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition value */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the condition value (e.g., string, integer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_values_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_users" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment (e.g., lead researcher, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_results" (
  "condition_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition result */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition that generated this result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition that generated this result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_results_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that this visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that this note belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote this note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
